description: Client environment overview — infrastructure health, alerts, VM performance, and monitoring coverage at a glance.

panels.description: Total Azure resources in this subscription.
panels.title: Resources

panels.description: Core service workloads (VMs, AKS, App Services, Databases, Storage).

azureResourceGraph.query:
Resources
| where subscriptionId in~ (${sub:singlequote})
| where type in~ (
    'microsoft.web/sites',
    'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines',
    'microsoft.containerservice/managedclusters',
    'microsoft.sql/servers/databases',
    'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts'
)
| summarize ServiceCount = count()

panels.title: Services

panels.description: Number of resource groups in the subscription.

azureResourceGraph.query:
ResourceContainers
| where type == "microsoft.resources/subscriptions/resourcegroups"
| where subscriptionId == ${sub:singlequote}
| summarize ResourceGroups = count()

panels.title: Resource Groups

panels.description: Distinct Azure resource types deployed.
panels.title: Resource Types

panels.description: Machines sending heartbeat telemetry in the last hour.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Heartbeat
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
| summarize MachinesReporting = dcount(Computer)

panels.title: Machines Reporting

panels.description: Minutes since the most recent heartbeat from any machine.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Heartbeat
| summarize LastHeartbeat = max(TimeGenerated)
| extend MinutesSinceHeartbeat = datetime_diff('minute', now(), LastHeartbeat)
| project MinutesSinceHeartbeat

panels.title: Heartbeat Freshness

panels.description: VMs detected in the selected resource group.

azureResourceGraph.query:
Resources
| where subscriptionId == ${sub:singlequote}
| where type =~ 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines'
| summarize VMCount = count()

panels.title: Virtual Machines

panels.description: Storage accounts in the subscription.

azureResourceGraph.query:
Resources
| where subscriptionId == ${sub:singlequote}
| where type =~ 'microsoft.storage/storageaccounts'
| summarize StorageCount = count()

panels.title: Storage Accounts

panels.description: Active Sev0 and Sev1 alerts. Non-zero means something needs immediate attention.

azureResourceGraph.query:
AlertsManagementResources
| where subscriptionId in~ (${sub:singlequote})
| where properties.essentials.monitorCondition =~ "Fired"
| where tostring(properties.essentials.severity) in ("Sev0","Sev1")
| summarize CriticalAlerts = count()

panels.title: Critical Alerts

panels.description: Active Sev2–Sev4 alerts. Potential issues or degraded conditions.

azureResourceGraph.query:
AlertsManagementResources
| where subscriptionId in~ (${sub:singlequote})
| where properties.essentials.monitorCondition =~ "Fired"
| where tostring(properties.essentials.severity) in ("Sev2","Sev3","Sev4")
| summarize WarningAlerts = dcount(id)

panels.title: Warning Alerts

panels.description: Total fired alerts across all severities.

azureResourceGraph.query:
AlertsManagementResources
| where subscriptionId in~ (${sub:singlequote})
| where properties.essentials.monitorCondition =~ "Fired"
| summarize TotalAlerts = count()

panels.title: Total Active Alerts

panels.description: Alerts resolved in the last 24 hours.

azureResourceGraph.query:
AlertsManagementResources
| where subscriptionId in~ (${sub:singlequote})
| where properties.essentials.monitorCondition =~ "Resolved"
| where todatetime(properties.essentials.lastModifiedDateTime) >= ago(24h)
| summarize ResolvedAlerts = count()

panels.title: Resolved (24h)

panels.description: Currently firing alerts with severity, affected resource, and start time.

azureResourceGraph.query:
AlertsManagementResources
| where subscriptionId in~ (${sub:singlequote})
| where properties.essentials.monitorCondition =~ "Fired"
| project
    Severity = tostring(properties.essentials.severity),
    AlertName = tostring(properties.essentials.alertRule),
    Resource = tostring(properties.essentials.targetResourceName),
    ResourceGroup = tostring(properties.essentials.targetResourceGroup),
    SignalType = tostring(properties.essentials.signalType),
    StartTime = todatetime(properties.essentials.startDateTime)
| order by StartTime desc

panels.title: Active Alerts

panels.description: Average CPU utilization across all monitored VMs.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "% Processor Time"
| where InstanceName == "_Total" or ObjectName == "Processor"
| summarize AvgCPU = avg(CounterValue) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: CPU %

panels.description: Average committed memory bytes in use across all VMs.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "% Committed Bytes In Use"
| summarize AvgMemory = avg(CounterValue) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: Memory %

panels.description: Average disk space used across all logical disks.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where ObjectName == "LogicalDisk"
| where CounterName == "% Free Space"
| extend UsedPct = 100.0 - CounterValue
| summarize DiskUsedPct = avg(UsedPct) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: Disk Used %

panels.description: Average network throughput across all monitored machines.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "Bytes Total/sec"
| summarize NetworkMBps = avg(CounterValue) / 1024 / 1024 by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: Network

panels.description: Top 10 VMs by CPU utilization.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let startDateTime = $__timeFrom;
let endDateTime = $__timeTo;
Perf
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where CounterName == "% Processor Time"
| where InstanceName == "_Total"
| extend ComputerId = iff(isempty(_ResourceId), Computer, _ResourceId)
| summarize AvgCPU = round(avg(CounterValue), 1) by Computer
| top 10 by AvgCPU desc

panels.title: Top CPU

panels.description: Top 10 VMs by memory utilization.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let startDateTime = $__timeFrom;
let endDateTime = $__timeTo;
Perf
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where CounterName == "% Committed Bytes In Use"
| summarize AvgMemory = round(avg(CounterValue), 1) by Computer
| top 10 by AvgMemory desc

panels.title: Top Memory

panels.description: Top 10 VMs by disk space used.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let startDateTime = $__timeFrom;
let endDateTime = $__timeTo;
Perf
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where ObjectName == "LogicalDisk"
| where CounterName == "% Free Space"
| extend UsedPct = 100.0 - CounterValue
| summarize AvgDisk = round(avg(UsedPct), 1) by Computer
| top 10 by AvgDisk desc

panels.title: Top Disk

panels.description: Top 10 VMs by network throughput.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let startDateTime = $__timeFrom;
let endDateTime = $__timeTo;
Perf
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where CounterName == "Bytes Total/sec"
| summarize AvgNet = round(avg(CounterValue) / 1024 / 1024, 2) by Computer
| top 10 by AvgNet desc

panels.title: Top Network

panels.description: Detailed CPU utilization statistics per VM with percentile breakdown.

azureResourceGraph.query:
resources
| where tolower(type) contains "virtualmachines" and resourceGroup in~ ($rg) 
| project Name = tolower(name), tenantId, resourceGroup

panels.title: CPU Utilization Statistics

panels.description: Detailed memory utilization statistics per VM with percentile breakdown.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let startDateTime = $__timeFrom;
let endDateTime = $__timeTo;
let maxResultCount = 10;
Perf
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where CounterName == "% Committed Bytes In Use"
| extend ComputerId = iff(isempty(_ResourceId), Computer, _ResourceId)
| summarize Average = round(avg(CounterValue), 2), Max = round(max(CounterValue), 2), P50th = round(percentile(CounterValue, 50), 2), P90th = round(percentile(CounterValue, 90), 2), P95th = round(percentile(CounterValue, 95), 2) by ComputerId, Computer, _ResourceId
| top maxResultCount by Average desc
| parse tolower(_ResourceId) with * "resourcegroups/" resourceGroup "/providers/microsoft.compute/" typeVM "/" nameVM
| project Computer, resourceGroup, Average, P50th, P90th, P95th, Max, Type = typeVM, Name = nameVM

azureResourceGraph.query:
resources
| where tolower(type) contains "virtualmachines" and resourceGroup in~ ($rg) 
| project Name = tolower(name), tenantId, resourceGroup

panels.title: Memory Utilization Statistics

panels.description: Detailed disk space statistics per VM.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let startDateTime = $__timeFrom;
let endDateTime = $__timeTo;
let maxResultCount = 10;
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where Origin == 'vm.azm.ms' and (Namespace == 'LogicalDisk' and Name == 'FreeSpaceMB')
| extend ComputerId = iff(isempty(_ResourceId), Computer, _ResourceId)
| extend Tags = todynamic(Tags)
| extend Total = todouble(Tags['vm.azm.ms/diskSizeMB']), MountId = tostring(Tags['vm.azm.ms/mountId'])
| extend Val = (100.0 - (Val * 100.0)/Total)
| summarize Average = round(avg(Val), 2), Max = round(max(Val), 2), P50th = round(percentile(Val, 50), 2), P90th = round(percentile(Val, 90), 2), P95th = round(percentile(Val, 95), 2) by MountId, ComputerId, Computer, _ResourceId
| top maxResultCount by Average desc
| parse tolower(_ResourceId) with * "resourcegroups/" resourceGroup "/providers/microsoft.compute/" typeVM "/" nameVM
| project Computer, resourceGroup, MountId, Average, P50th, P90th, P95th, Max, Type = typeVM, Name = nameVM

azureResourceGraph.query:
resources
| where tolower(type) contains "virtualmachines" and resourceGroup in~ ($rg) 
| project Name = tolower(name), tenantId, resourceGroup

panels.title: Disk Space Statistics

panels.description: Detailed network receive statistics per VM.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let startDateTime = $__timeFrom;
let endDateTime = $__timeTo;
let maxResultCount = 10;
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where Origin == 'vm.azm.ms' and (Namespace == 'Network' and Name == 'ReadBytesPerSecond')
| extend ComputerId = iff(isempty(_ResourceId), Computer, _ResourceId)
| summarize Average = round(avg(Val)/1024/1024, 3), Max = round(max(Val)/1024/1024, 3), P50th = round(percentile(Val, 50)/1024/1024, 3), P90th = round(percentile(Val, 90)/1024/1024, 3), P95th = round(percentile(Val, 95)/1024/1024, 3) by ComputerId, Computer, _ResourceId
| top maxResultCount by Average desc
| parse tolower(_ResourceId) with * "resourcegroups/" resourceGroup "/providers/microsoft.compute/" typeVM "/" nameVM
| project Computer, resourceGroup, Average, P50th, P90th, P95th, Max, Type = typeVM, Name = nameVM

azureResourceGraph.query:
resources
| where tolower(type) contains "virtualmachines" and resourceGroup in~ ($rg) 
| project Name = tolower(name), tenantId, resourceGroup

panels.title: Network Receive Statistics (MB/s)

panels.description: Heartbeat signal volume over time. Drops indicate machines going offline or agents failing.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Heartbeat
| summarize Heartbeats = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: Heartbeat Timeline

panels.description: System event volume over time. Spikes may indicate failures, reboots, or other system activity.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Event
| summarize Events = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: System Event Volume

panels.description: InsightsMetrics ingestion activity. Confirms performance metrics are being collected. If empty, the environment may not populate InsightsMetrics.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
InsightsMetrics
| summarize Metrics = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: Metric Activity

panels.description: All Azure resources in the selected subscription.

azureResourceGraph.query:
Resources
| where subscriptionId == ${sub:singlequote}
| project
    ResourceName = name,
    ResourceType = type,
    ResourceGroup = resourceGroup,
    Region = location
| order by ResourceGroup asc

panels.title: Monitored Resources

list.label: Aggregate
list.name: agg
list.query: Average : score = round(avg(Val)\, 2), P5th : score= round(percentile(Val\, 5)\, 2),  P10th : score= round(percentile(Val\, 10)\, 2), P50th : score= round(percentile(Val\, 50)\, 2), P80th : score= round(percentile(Val\, 80)\, 2), P90th : score= round(percentile(Val\, 90)\, 2), P95th : score= round(percentile(Val\, 95)\, 2)

title: Client Overview
